package foo.bar.feature_test.ui

import androidx.compose.material3.MaterialTheme
import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
import androidx.compose.runtime.LaunchedEffect
import androidx.compose.runtime.getValue
import androidx.compose.ui.tooling.preview.Preview
import androidx.lifecycle.compose.collectAsStateWithLifecycle
import foo.bar.feature_test.presentation.TestScreenViewState
import foo.bar.feature_test.presentation.TestViewModel
import foo.bar.navigation.LocalNavController
import org.koin.compose.viewmodel.koinViewModel

// Generated by featuregen 1.0.00
@Composable
fun TestScreen() {
    val viewModel: TestViewModel = koinViewModel<TestViewModel>()
    val state by viewModel.uiState.collectAsStateWithLifecycle()

    val navController = LocalNavController.current

    LaunchedEffect(viewModel) {
        viewModel.sideEffects.collect { event ->
        }
    }

    TestScreenContent(
        state = state,
    )
}

@Composable
private fun TestScreenContent(
    state: TestScreenViewState,
) {
}

@Composable
@Preview(widthDp = 1000, heightDp = 1000)
fun TestScreenPreviewLarge() {
    MaterialTheme {
        TestScreenContent(
            state = TestScreenViewState(
                str = "",
            ),
        )
    }
}

@Composable
@Preview
fun TestScreenPreview() {
    MaterialTheme {
        TestScreenContent(
            state = TestScreenViewState(
                str = "",
            ),
        )
    }
}
